title: Basel, Basel-Stadt — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Basel, Basel-Stadt: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Basel is a city in Basel-Stadt with a population of 178,000. A major cultural and pharmaceutical hub on the Rhine River, known for its world-class museums, medieval old town, and tri-border location.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
